name: Belmont School Gym
description: Belmont School Gym is a place to play pickleball in Belmont, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Carnes Convention Center
description: Carnes Convention Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Clairsville, OH. The court surface is concrete. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: St Clairsville Memorial Park Tennis Courts
description: St Clairsville Memorial Park Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in St. Clairsville, OH. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: St Clairsville Recreation Center
description: St Clairsville Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Clairsville, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
